description: A product manager or product-minded builder who needs to extract, articulate, and maintain product context using the Discovery Tree framework.

activities.title: Set Up a Product Line
activities.goal: Create the top-level container that holds all discovery work for one product.

stories.action: Open the Product Line Selector dropdown
Click "New Product Line"
Enter name and confirm
Click product line title to edit inline
Click product line description to edit inline
Open Product Line Selector and click delete

activities.title: Define Personas
activities.goal: Create and manage user/buyer personas for the current product line.

stories.action: Expand the Persona Manager section in the sidebar
Click "Add Persona" to open the slide-over form
Enter name and description
Save the persona
Click pencil icon on a Persona Item to open slide-over
Modify fields and save
Click trash icon on a Persona Item

activities.title: Define a Business Outcome
activities.goal: Create the top-level strategic goal for the product line.

stories.action: Click "Overview" in the sidebar
Click the dashed "Add Business Outcome" button
Enter title and description, then confirm
Edit title inline (click pencil on hover)
Add or edit description inline
Add a content block (accordion, pills, quote, metric)
Edit an existing block
Delete a block
Change status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Drop entity and all children via status change confirmation
Click "Add Product Outcome" in the children section

activities.title: Define a Product Outcome
activities.goal: Break a business outcome into measurable product-level results.

stories.action: Click the Business Outcome in the Entity Tree or Breadcrumb
Click "Add Product Outcome" in the children section
Enter title and description, then confirm
Edit title inline (click pencil on hover)
Add or edit description inline
Add a content block (accordion, pills, quote, metric)
Edit an existing block
Delete a block
Change status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Drop entity and all children via status change confirmation
Assign a primary persona via the Persona Picker pill
Add secondary personas via the multi-select picker
Remove a secondary persona by unchecking in the picker
Click "Add Opportunity" in the children section

activities.title: Map Opportunities
activities.goal: Identify user needs and pain points that a product outcome could address.

stories.action: Click the Product Outcome in the Entity Tree or Breadcrumb
Click "Add Opportunity" in the children section
Enter title and description, then confirm
Click the Persona Picker pill on the entity tab
Select a persona from the dropdown
Edit title inline (click pencil on hover)
Add or edit description inline
Add a content block (accordion, pills, quote, metric)
Edit an existing block
Delete a block
Change status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Drop entity and all children via status change confirmation
Click "Add Solution" in the children section

activities.title: Design Solutions
activities.goal: Propose concrete solutions that address an identified opportunity.

stories.action: Click the Opportunity in the Entity Tree or Breadcrumb
Click "Add Solution" in the children section
Enter title and description, then confirm
Edit title inline (click pencil on hover)
Add or edit description inline
Add a content block (accordion, pills, quote, metric)
Edit an existing block
Delete a block
Change status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Drop entity and all children via status change confirmation
Click "Add Assumption" in the children section

activities.title: Validate Assumptions
activities.goal: Surface and test the riskiest assumptions behind a solution.

stories.action: Click the Solution in the Entity Tree or Breadcrumb
Click "Add Assumption" in the children section
Enter title and description, then confirm — template creates Belief and Evidence accordion blocks
Click "Set type" pill in assumption header to open type picker
Select one of 5 types: Desirability, Usability, Feasibility, Viability, Ethical
View colored type pill with tooltip on hover
Change or clear the type by reopening the picker
See assumption type pill on child cards in parent's children grid
Edit title inline (click pencil on hover)
Add or edit description inline
Add a content block (accordion, pills, quote, metric)
Edit an existing block
Delete a block
Change status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Drop entity and all children via status change confirmation
Click "Add Test" in the children section — template creates Define Test and Pass/Fail Criteria accordion blocks
Click "Set type" pill in test header to open type picker
Select one of 4 types: Prototype Test, One-Question Survey, Data Mining, Research Spike
View colored type pill with tooltip on hover
Change or clear the type by reopening the picker
See test type pill on child cards in parent's children grid
Edit title inline (click pencil on hover)
Add or edit description inline
Add a content block (accordion, pills, quote, metric)
Edit an existing block
Delete a block
Change status via the Status Picker
Copy the context anchor for AI reference
Delete the entity (only when it has no children)
Drop entity and all children via status change confirmation

activities.title: Organize & Prioritize
activities.goal: Manage entity statuses and views to focus on what matters most.

stories.action: Open an entity and use the Status Picker
Click the Kanban icon in the View Toggle
Drag a Child Card from one Kanban Column to another
Click the Archived Toggle in the Done column
Click the Grid icon in the View Toggle

activities.title: Navigate & Review
activities.goal: Move through the discovery tree to review and connect ideas.

stories.action: Click "Overview" in the sidebar
Click any entity in the Entity Tree sidebar
Click any segment in the Breadcrumb to jump up
Open the Product Line Selector and choose another line
Click the Sidebar Toggle to collapse/expand
